description: Sector overlay for French healthcare providers, health facilities, health data, clinical services, medical devices, and health-sector regulated documents.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Health. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Haute Autorité de Santé quality and certification materials
French health ministry and regional health agency framework
French Medical Council professional ethics materials
primary_sources.issuer: Conseil national de l'Ordre des médecins

rules.title: Patient confidentiality and health-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient confidentiality, medical secrecy, health data, consent, GDPR/RGPD, or secure health-data handling evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Quality, certification, or clinical governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for HAS certification, quality management, care pathway, clinical governance, or adverse-event evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Health facility authorization or ARS evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ARS authorization, health facility approval, healthcare activity authorization, or regulated professional status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Medical product/device regulatory evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for medical device, CE marking, pharmacovigilance, materiovigilance, ANSM, or health-product safety evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
